validationRules.errorMessage: You cannot Reparent this record.
Phase End Date must be after Phase Start date.
Initial End date must be after Initial Start date.
Path to Green field should be used only for Late, At Risk or On Hold projects. Please use Health Comment for On Track projects
SOX Comment should be blank if SOX Impact is not checked
SOX Comment should not be blank if SOX Impact is checked
Actual hours worked cannot be negative numbers
Hours can only be self updated
Availability must be in between 0 and 100
Fiscal Year must be in the format of FYXX
The default availability should be between 0 to 100
Resource planning years in advance should be greater than 0
Start month for fiscal year setting should be in between 1 and 12
On Hold Reason should not be Blank if Status is 'On Hold'.
End Date must be after Start Date.
If you choose a 'Dealer Item', then you must select an  'Installation Type'.

🔒 Edit Blocked: You cannot modify this Labor & Product Item because the Sales Document status is set to “SOLD”.
🔧 To make changes, go to the Sales Document and update the status to “OPEN”.
Quantity cannot be zero. Please enter a quantity greater than zero.
If you choose a 'Dealer Item', then you must select a 'Size Category'.
You must enter the Permit Applied Date when a Permit Issue Date is provided.
You must enter the Permit Expiration Date when a Permit Issue Date is provided.
You must enter the Permit Number when a Permit Issue Date is provided
You must enter the Permit Applied Date when providing a Permit Number.
You must enter the Permit Expiration Date when providing a Permit Number.
You must enter the Permit Issue Date when providing a Permit Number.
If checking materials out of the inventory, you must enter QUANTITY.
If checking materials out of the inventory, you must enter TYPE OF MATERIAL.
When entering an Inventory Purchase, you must enter QUANTITY.
When entering inventory purchase, you must enter the TYPE OF MATERIAL.
The sum of the percentages must equal 100%.
You cannot mark the Sales Document as 'Sold' when the Document Type is 'Proposal' or 'Service Proposal'.
Upon agreement cannot be greater than 100%.
Upon completion cannot be greater than 100%.
Upon delivery cannot be greater than 100%.
Please specify the Vendor. It is required when Product Lump Sum Cost is specified.
Please enter the Vendor Quote Number. It is required when Product Lump Sum Cost is specified.
Please enter a COST for this line item or mark it as 'Excluded' to save.

🔒 Locked Item: You cannot modify a Specialty Item because the Sales Document is marked as “SOLD”.
🔓 To make changes, go to the Sales Document and change the status back to “OPEN”.
You must assign a coordinator when the schedule status is 'Awaiting Scheduling'.
Account Business Internal Role is a required field.
Account Name is a required field.
Account Record Type is a required field.
Contact Last Name is a required field.
Related To should be made empty when creating new Account.
Contact/Lead should be made empty when creating new Contact.
Email Address is a required field.
Contact First Name is a required field.
